headline: Edison International Opens Applications for Lineworker Scholarship
summary: ROSEMEAD, Calif., March 19, 2026--Today, Edison International announced the launch of the 2026 Lineworker Scholarship. Developed in partnership with IBEW Local 47, it offers a pathway to careers in skilled trades within the energy and utility industry.
